title: K2D Font
description: K2D is a Thai and Latin family which has a modern appearance but features Thai's traditional looped letterforms.
body:
![font preview.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f19f0f631f10a25ca41939f5aeee37598c78290.jpeg)

[K2D](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/K2D) is a Thai and Latin family which has a modern appearance but features Thai's traditional looped letterforms.

Designed by Cadson Demak.
